title: Prevent members from same domain from inviting new users
excerpt: It seems like there used to be a way to do this, but allow a setting that prevents users (even ones from the same domain) from inviting new users (also from the same domain, but also any domain) as a way to manage subscr…

posts.author: taz101108 (Jennifer Erickson)
posts.cookedHtml:
It seems like there used to be a way to do this, but allow a setting that prevents users (even ones from the same domain) from inviting new users (also from the same domain, but also any domain) as a way to manage subscriptions and cost.

Restricting 'Invite Members' function to a specific role Platform discussions
Hello , if your are the administrator you can restrict this simply from: Profile Icon – >Admin —> Security — > [DEMO]

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jennifer,

If I am understanding correctly it is possible to restrict users from inviting new users (with the same domain or not) under the Admin settings > Security > Login.

You will need to ensure that the outlined option is not selected.

Screen Shot 2023-10-11 at 11.51.37 am2228×958 231 KB

Let me know if this helps

posts.author: taz101108 (Jennifer Erickson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Yes, this is what I was looking for. Thank you for directing me here, I appreciate it!!

  • Jen

posts.cookedHtml: Hi I can’t find it in the new version where is that?
